title: Bitcoin Rollups
description: Bitcoin rollups execute transactions or contracts off-chain and commit compressed state data or validity evidence to Bitcoin. They aim to scale execution while inheriting selected settlement or verification guarantees from the base layer.

resources.title: Bitcoin Rollups
resources.notes: Dedicated overview of validity-rollup designs for Bitcoin.

resources.title: Bitcoin Layer Two Resources
resources.notes: Curated entry point to rollups and related Bitcoin layers.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Bitcoin settlement, transactions, and layer architecture.
